action: Check video generation status using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} until all videos are marked successful.
fallback_action: Remind me to retry the video generation process and ensure the data entry is correctly updated in memory.

recipe.steps: Fetch the video generation status using the provided API for each conversation ID until all videos are marked successful.
Save the generated conversation IDs in memory using appropriate keys structured to store genre-specific data.
